title: Echoes of Fear
description: A dark horror modpack. The Cave Dweller hunts you, Arthropod Phobia adds nightmare creatures, Herobrine returns through From the Fog, and the Knocker waits below. Survive if you dare.
body:
💀 Echoes of Fear – The Ultimate Minecraft Horror Experience (****Forge**** / ****Fabric**** 1.20.1)

This horror modpack for Minecraft ****Forge**** / ****Fabric**** 1.20.1 turns your world into a dark, terrifying survival experience. Deep within the caves, the Cave Dweller stalks you – silent, merciless, and always listening. The Arthropod Phobia mods with their Expansions and Horror Bosses introduce new terrifying monsters and nightmarish spiders that will test your courage with every encounter. From the Fog brings back the legend of Herobrine – mysterious, unpredictable, and haunting your every move – while The End of Herobrine continues his grim story, revealing the darkness behind the myth. Down in the mines, you’ll hear the Knocker – a sinister presence that watches and waits. This modpack is not for the faint of heart. Enter the darkness, survive the terror, and discover what truly lurks in the shadows.
